name: buy-vs-build
description: Forces coding agents to decide whether to buy, reuse, or build before writing code.

interface.shortDescription: Decide reuse vs in-house code first.
interface.longDescription: Adds an always-on buy-vs-build checkpoint before coding: standard library, native platform, installed dependencies, open source, commercial services, then in-house implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use buy-vs-build for this coding task.
Review this diff for unnecessary custom code.
Should we use a library or build this in-house?
